query: "amyotrophic lateral sclerosis" OR "motor neuron disease" OR "motor neurone disease" OR "SOD1 ALS" OR "C9orf72 ALS" OR "TDP-43 ALS"

items.title: Therapeutic frontiers in ALS: iPSC-based drug discovery, cell therapy, and gene therapy-Advances through 2026.
items.summary: Three converging therapeutic paradigms-iPSC-based drug discovery, cell transplantation, and gene therapy-have substantially expanded the therapeutic pipeline for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) between 2020 and 2026. The FDA's accelerated approval of tofersen (Qalsody) in April 2023 marked the first treatment targeting a genetic cause of ALS. iPSC-derived drug candidates, including ropinirole and bosutinib, have completed early-phase clinical trials led by Japanese institutions. Cell therapies targeting neuroinflammation through regulatory T cells are being actively explored as immunomodulatory strategies, although efficacy remains to be established in adequately powered trials. Next-generation gene-silencing approaches-including RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics and AAV-delivered microRNA-entered first-in-human trials in 2024-2025. The identification of STMN2 as a downstream target of TDP-43 dysfunction has opened a potential TDP-43-downstream nucleic acid therapeutic avenue for sporadic ALS, which constitutes approximately 90% of all cases, with company-reported interim data suggesting target engagement in the ongoing Phase 1/2 ANQUR trial (QRL-201). This review synthesizes the latest evidence across all three therapeutic domains, with attention to the hierarchy of evidence, regulatory milestones, and the pioneering contributions of Japanese research groups.
items.titleZh: ALS治疗前沿：基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞治疗与基因治疗——截至2026年的进展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了2020-2026年间ALS治疗的三大前沿方向：iPSC药物发现、细胞治疗和基因治疗。重点包括FDA批准首个针对遗传病因的tofersen、日本团队推进的iPSC衍生药物、靶向神经炎症的T细胞疗法，以及针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法（如QRL-201）进入临床试验。
items.insight: 该综述系统梳理了ALS治疗从基因靶向到细胞免疫调节的多元化进展，尤其突出了TDP-43下游通路（STMN2）作为散发性ALS新靶点的转化潜力，以及日本研究团队在iPSC药物开发中的引领作用，为ALS研究者提供了全面的管线更新和证据等级参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: iPSC药物、细胞治疗和基因治疗三大范式在2020-2026年显著扩展了ALS治疗管线，其中TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法（QRL-201）已进入1/2期试验并显示靶点结合。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始数据；细胞疗法和部分基因疗法的疗效尚未在大型试验中确认。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注ANQUR试验（QRL-201）的完整数据公布，以及日本团队iPSC衍生药物的后续临床试验结果。

items.abstractZh: 三种汇聚的治疗范式——基于iPSC的药物发现、细胞移植和基因治疗——在2020年至2026年间显著扩展了肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的治疗管线。2023年4月，FDA加速批准tofersen（Qalsody），标志着首个针对ALS遗传病因的治疗方法。由日本机构主导的iPSC衍生候选药物（包括罗匹尼罗和博舒替尼）已完成早期临床试验。通过调节性T细胞靶向神经炎症的细胞疗法正作为免疫调节策略被积极探索，但其疗效尚需在充分有力的试验中确立。下一代基因沉默方法——包括RNA干扰（RNAi）疗法和AAV递送的microRNA——于2024-2025年进入首次人体试验。STMN2被确定为TDP-43功能障碍的下游靶点，为约占所有病例90%的散发性ALS开辟了一条潜在的TDP-43下游核酸治疗途径，公司报告的期中数据显示正在进行的1/2期ANQUR试验（QRL-201）中实现了靶点结合。本综述综合了这三个治疗领域的最新证据，关注证据等级、监管里程碑以及日本研究团队的先驱性贡献。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述涵盖截至2026年的最新进展，包括2024-2025年进入人体试验的下一代基因沉默疗法和针对TDP-43下游靶点STMN2的核酸疗法，具有高度ALS相关性和新近性。

items.title: Optimized multiplex immunofluorescent protocols for simultaneous in situ identification of α-motoneuron subtypes.
items.summary: Accurate identification of α-motoneuron (α-MN) subtypes - slow (S), fast fatigue-resistant (FR), fast fatigue-intermediate (FI), and fast fatigable (FF) - is essential for studying motor circuit organization and selective vulnerability in neurodegenerative disease. While electrophysiological approaches can distinguish these subtypes, existing immunohistochemical (IHC) methods lack the ability to simultaneously identify all four α-MN classes in situ, particularly the FI subtype, limiting their utility for large-scale or tissue-based analyses. Here, we present novel multiplex immunofluorescent strategies that enables simultaneous in situ identification of S, FR, FI, and FF α-MN subtypes, including intermediate populations, within single sections of mouse lumbar spinal cord. This approach integrates a combinatorial marker framework with optimized co-labeling conditions to resolve subtype-specific molecular signatures, including FI MNs, which have not been previously distinguishable using standard IHC methods. We establish a systematic validation pipeline demonstrating robust and reproducible subtype classification across multiple protocols, sexes, mouse strains, and disease conditions, including the G93A-SOD mouse model of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. Labeled populations recapitulate known size distributions and exhibit consistent subtype-specific patterns across lumbar segments, supporting both the accuracy and reproducibility of the method. By enabling comprehensive in situ classification of all major α-MN subtypes, this approach represents a substantive refinement of multiplex IF, overcoming key limitations of existing IF methods and enabling analyses of α-MN subtype organization and selective vulnerability that were previously not feasible with standard histological techniques. This framework is broadly applicable to studies of motor system organization, aging, and neurodegenerative disease.
items.titleZh: 优化的多重免疫荧光方案用于同时原位鉴定α运动神经元亚型
items.summaryZh: 该研究开发了一种优化的多重免疫荧光方案，可在小鼠脊髓切片中同时区分四种α运动神经元亚型（S、FR、FI、FF），包括此前难以鉴定的FI亚型。该方法在ALS小鼠模型（G93A-SOD）中验证了其准确性和可重复性，为研究运动神经元选择性易损性提供了新工具。
items.insight: ALS研究者应关注此方法，因为它首次实现了在组织切片中同时区分所有α运动神经元亚型，特别是FI亚型，这为解析ALS中不同运动神经元亚型的选择性易损性机制提供了关键工具，有助于理解疾病进展的细胞基础。

aiRead.keyFinding: 开发了可同时原位鉴定四种α运动神经元亚型（包括FI亚型）的多重免疫荧光方案，并在ALS小鼠模型中验证了其稳健性。
aiRead.limitation: 该方法目前仅在G93A-SOD小鼠模型中验证，尚未在人类组织或其他ALS模型中测试。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注该方法在人类脊髓组织或更多ALS模型中的应用，以及其是否有助于揭示运动神经元亚型选择性易损性的分子机制。

items.abstractZh: 准确鉴定α运动神经元（α-MN）亚型——慢速（S）、快速抗疲劳（FR）、快速疲劳中间型（FI）和快速易疲劳（FF）——对于研究运动回路组织和神经退行性疾病中的选择性易损性至关重要。虽然电生理方法可以区分这些亚型，但现有的免疫组织化学（IHC）方法无法同时原位鉴定所有四种α-MN类别，特别是FI亚型，限制了其在大规模或组织分析中的应用。在此，我们提出了新颖的多重免疫荧光策略，能够在单个小鼠腰髓切片中同时原位鉴定S、FR、FI和FF α-MN亚型，包括中间群体。该方法整合了组合标记框架与优化的共标记条件，以解析亚型特异性分子特征，包括之前使用标准IHC方法无法区分的FI运动神经元。我们建立了一个系统验证流程，证明在多种方案、性别、小鼠品系和疾病条件（包括肌萎缩侧索硬化症的G93A-SOD小鼠模型）下，亚型分类具有稳健性和可重复性。标记的群体重现了已知的大小分布，并在腰段表现出一致的亚型特异性模式，支持了方法的准确性和可重复性。通过实现所有主要α-MN亚型的全面原位分类，该方法代表了多重IF的实质性改进，克服了现有IF方法的关键限制，并使得之前使用标准组织学技术无法进行的α-MN亚型组织和选择性易损性分析成为可能。该框架广泛适用于运动系统组织、衰老和神经退行性疾病的研究。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，针对ALS中运动神经元亚型鉴定的长期技术瓶颈，提出了创新的多重免疫荧光方案，具有直接的ALS转化价值。

items.title: Innate immune crosstalk in ALS/FTD pathogenesis.
items.summary: Marked by protein aggregation, impaired proteostasis, organelle stress, and chronic neuroinflammation, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) form a clinically, genetically, and pathologically overlapping disease spectrum. Increasing evidence indicates that innate immune activation is not merely a secondary response to neuronal injury, but an active driver of disease progression. In this review, we elaborate on how ALS/FTD-associated genetic lesions and pathogenic protein aggregates, including TDP-43, SOD1, FUS, and C9orf72-derived dipeptide repeat proteins, engage three interconnected innate immune pathways: cGAS-STING, NLRP3 inflammasomes, and TREM2-DAP12 signaling. We further highlight emerging crosstalk among these pathways, in which cGAS-STING and NLRP3 reinforce inflammatory signaling, while NLRP3-driven TREM2 shedding may impair microglial clearance and perpetuate proteostatic failure. Understanding this immune network may help define disease subtypes, identify biomarkers, and guide combinatorial therapeutic strategies that suppress harmful inflammation while preserving protective microglial functions.
items.titleZh: ALS/FTD发病机制中的先天免疫串扰
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，先天免疫激活在ALS/FTD中不仅是继发反应，更是疾病进展的主动驱动因素。文章重点分析了cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12三条免疫通路如何被TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72等致病蛋白激活，并揭示了它们之间的相互串扰，例如cGAS-STING和NLRP3相互增强炎症，而NLRP3导致TREM2脱落可能削弱小胶质细胞清除功能。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路的最新进展，特别是cGAS-STING、NLRP3和TREM2之间的串扰机制，为理解神经炎症如何驱动疾病进展提供了新框架，并提示组合免疫调节策略可能是未来治疗方向。

aiRead.keyFinding: 先天免疫激活是ALS/FTD进展的主动驱动因素，cGAS-STING、NLRP3和TREM2三条通路之间存在相互串扰，共同加剧神经炎症和蛋白质稳态失败。
aiRead.limitation: 作为综述，未提供原始实验数据，提出的免疫网络模型需要进一步在动物模型和临床样本中验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注针对cGAS-STING或NLRP3通路的抑制剂在ALS/FTD模型中的治疗效果，以及TREM2脱落作为生物标志物的临床验证研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）以蛋白质聚集、蛋白质稳态受损、细胞器应激和慢性神经炎症为特征，构成一个临床、遗传和病理上重叠的疾病谱。越来越多的证据表明，先天免疫激活不仅是神经元损伤的继发性反应，而且是疾病进展的主动驱动因素。在本综述中，我们详细阐述了ALS/FTD相关的遗传病变和致病性蛋白聚集体（包括TDP-43、SOD1、FUS和C9orf72衍生的二肽重复蛋白）如何参与三个相互关联的先天免疫通路：cGAS-STING、NLRP3炎症小体和TREM2-DAP12信号传导。我们进一步强调了这些通路之间新兴的串扰，其中cGAS-STING和NLRP3增强炎症信号，而NLRP3驱动的TREM2脱落可能损害小胶质细胞清除功能并延续蛋白质稳态失败。理解这一免疫网络可能有助于定义疾病亚型、识别生物标志物，并指导组合治疗策略，以抑制有害炎症同时保留保护性小胶质细胞功能。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦ALS/FTD中先天免疫通路串扰这一前沿方向，具有高度ALS相关性，为疾病亚型分类和组合治疗策略提供了新见解。

items.title: PBMC DEG/miRNA biomarkers of TDP-43 pathology in ALS.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) lacks reliable, disease-specific, and minimally invasive biomarkers, representing a major barrier to early diagnosis and patient stratification. The primary aim of this translational pilot study was to identify a disease-specific, TDP-43-related, gene-microRNA (miRNA) signature in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of ALS patients with potential diagnostic value. To this end, we first identified differentially expressed disease-specific genes (dsDEGs) using a TDP-43-based rat model of ALS, generated by stereotaxic infusion of full-length (FL) TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43) into the motor cortex. Transcriptomic profiling of the motor cortex revealed candidate dsDEGs, which were subsequently validated by RT-qPCR in motor cortex, spinal cord, and PBMCs from the same animals. To assess translational relevance, expression levels of these dsDEGs were analyzed in PBMCs from early- to mid-stage ALS patients and matched healthy controls, while disease specificity was evaluated using Parkinson's disease (PD) samples. In parallel, conserved miRNAs predicted to target the identified dsDEGs were examined in both rat and human PBMCs. Five dsDEGs, Mctp1, Penk, Mt2A, Drd1, and Rasgrp2, were consistently dysregulated across central and peripheral tissues in the TDP-43 rat model. RT-qPCR analysis of human PBMCs confirmed significant and selective dysregulation of these genes in ALS, but not in PD, supporting disease specificity. Moreover, exposure of human neuroblastoma cells and healthy PBMCs to TDP-43 recapitulated the ALS-like expression changes. Computational and experimental analyses identified seven conserved miRNAs targeting these dsDEGs, of which four were significantly downregulated in ALS PBMCs, supporting a coordinated regulatory network. Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analyses demonstrated strong discriminative performance for both the gene signature (AUC 0.87-1.00) and the associated miRNAs (AUC 0.95-1.00). Together, these findings define a novel PBMC-based gene-miRNA signature that mirrors central ALS pathology and shows high diagnostic accuracy and disease specificity, highlighting its potential as a minimally invasive biomarker for ALS.
items.titleZh: ALS中TDP-43病理的PBMC DEG/miRNA生物标志物
items.summaryZh: 本研究在ALS患者外周血单核细胞中发现一组由5个基因和4个miRNA组成的特征，能高精度区分ALS与健康对照及帕金森病，且与中枢TDP-43病理相关。
items.insight: 该研究首次在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出与中枢TDP-43病理直接相关的基因-miRNA联合特征，诊断AUC高达0.87-1.00，且能区分ALS与PD，为开发微创、疾病特异性的ALS诊断和分层工具提供了新候选。

aiRead.studyType: 转化性初步研究（动物模型+临床样本验证）
aiRead.keyFinding: 在ALS患者PBMC中鉴定出5个基因（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1、Rasgrp2）和4个miRNA组成的特征，能高精度区分ALS与健康对照及PD（AUC 0.87-1.00），且与中枢TDP-43病理一致。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（早期至中期ALS患者），未包含其他神经退行性疾病对照，且未在独立队列中验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 需在更大、更多样化的ALS队列中验证该特征，并探索其与疾病进展和预后的关联，以及能否在更早期阶段检测到病理变化。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）缺乏可靠、疾病特异且微创的生物标志物，这是早期诊断和患者分层的主要障碍。本转化性初步研究的主要目的是在ALS患者的外周血单核细胞（PBMC）中识别具有潜在诊断价值的疾病特异性、TDP-43相关的基因-微小RNA（miRNA）特征。为此，我们首先使用基于TDP-43的ALS大鼠模型（通过将全长TDP-43立体定向注入运动皮层生成）鉴定了差异表达的疾病特异性基因（dsDEG）。运动皮层的转录组分析揭示了候选dsDEG，随后通过RT-qPCR在同一动物的运动皮层、脊髓和PBMC中进行了验证。为评估转化相关性，分析了早期至中期ALS患者和匹配健康对照PBMC中这些dsDEG的表达水平，并使用帕金森病（PD）样本评估了疾病特异性。同时，在人和大鼠PBMC中检测了预测靶向已识别dsDEG的保守miRNA。在TDP-43大鼠模型中，五个dsDEG（Mctp1、Penk、Mt2A、Drd1和Rasgrp2）在中央和外周组织中一致失调。人PBMC的RT-qPCR分析证实这些基因在ALS中显著且选择性地失调，而在PD中则不然，支持疾病特异性。此外，将人神经母细胞瘤细胞和健康PBMC暴露于TDP-43重现了类似ALS的表达变化。计算和实验分析识别了靶向这些dsDEG的七个保守miRNA，其中四个在ALS PBMC中显著下调，支持一个协调的调控网络。受试者工作特征（ROC）分析显示基因特征（AUC 0.87-1.00）和相关miRNA（AUC 0.95-1.00）均具有强大的区分性能。总之，这些发现定义了一种新的基于PBMC的基因-miRNA特征，该特征反映了中枢ALS病理，并显示出高诊断准确性和疾病特异性，突显其作为ALS微创生物标志物的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，利用TDP-43大鼠模型与临床样本结合，首次在PBMC中鉴定出与中枢TDP-43病理直接相关的基因-miRNA特征，具有高诊断准确性和疾病特异性，为ALS微创生物标志物开发提供了新方向。

items.title: Early-onset neuroinflammation drives neurodegeneration caused by lysosomal PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency.
items.summary: Phosphatidylinositol 3,5-bisphosphate [PI(3,5)P 2 ] is a lysosomal signaling lipid whose deficiency, caused by mutations in the PIKfyve complex subunits FIG4 or VAC14, underlies a spectrum of fatal neurologic diseases including Charcot-Marie-Tooth type 4J (CMT4J) and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). To map the molecular consequences of PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency in the brain, we performed quantitative proteomic and transcriptomic analyses of three mouse lines bearing distinct loss-of-function mutations in Fig4 or Vac14, examining the brain at the presymptomatic and end stages. Strikingly, profound neuroinflammation was already present at postnatal day 5 (before significant neurodegeneration), characterized by complement activation, interferon signaling, and parenchymal infiltration of peripheral myeloid cells and T-cells. Isolated mutant microglia exhibited a markedly pro-oxidative transcriptional state with elevated reactive oxygen species, a partly non-cell-autonomous phenotype, being present in microglia from mice with conditional Fig4 inactivation in just neurons and astrocytes. Comparison of early (P5) and late (P25) proteomics data revealed that PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency impairs developmental remodeling of the brain proteome: proteins typically upregulated during postnatal maturation failed to accumulate, implicating lysosomal function in neurodevelopment. We identify coordinated elevation of p53, Fas receptor, inflammatory caspases, Gasdermin D, RIPK1, and ZBP1, consistent with multifactorial inflammatory cell death with features of apoptosis, pyroptosis, and necroptosis. Many of the dysregulated proteins are encoded by genes mutated in lysosomal storage disorders, ALS, CMT, Alzheimer's and Parkinson diseases, extending the pathogenic relevance of PI(3,5)P 2 insufficiency. Together, these findings establish that early neuroinflammation is a defining - and likely initiating - feature of neurodegeneration caused by disruption of lysosomal PI(3,5)P 2 .
items.titleZh: 早发性神经炎症驱动由溶酶体PI(3,5)P2不足引起的神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 该研究通过分析三种不同Fig4或Vac14突变小鼠模型，发现溶酶体PI(3,5)P2信号脂质不足在神经退行性变发生前即引发强烈的早期神经炎症，包括补体激活、干扰素信号和外周免疫细胞浸润。小胶质细胞呈现促氧化状态，且这种炎症部分由神经元和星形胶质细胞中的非细胞自主机制驱动。研究还揭示了PI(3,5)P2不足阻碍大脑发育蛋白质组重塑，并激活多种炎症性细胞死亡通路（凋亡、焦亡、坏死性凋亡）。许多失调蛋白与ALS、阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病的致病基因相关。
items.insight: 该研究首次系统证明溶酶体PI(3,5)P2不足引发的神经炎症是神经退行性变的早期驱动因素而非单纯后果，为ALS等疾病中神经炎症的起始机制提供了新视角，并揭示了小胶质细胞非细胞自主激活的机制，提示早期抗炎干预可能具有治疗价值。

aiRead.keyFinding: 溶酶体PI(3,5)P2不足在神经退行性变发生前即引发早期神经炎症，且该炎症部分由神经元和星形胶质细胞的非细胞自主信号驱动，并激活多种炎症性细胞死亡通路。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于小鼠模型，人类中PI(3,5)P2不足与神经炎症的时序关系及具体机制仍需验证；未直接测试抗炎干预的效果。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否在ALS患者样本中验证PI(3,5)P2相关通路异常，以及靶向早期神经炎症（如补体或干扰素通路）的干预策略在动物模型中的疗效。

items.abstractZh: 磷脂酰肌醇3,5-二磷酸[PI(3,5)P2]是一种溶酶体信号脂质，其缺乏由PIKfyve复合体亚基FIG4或VAC14突变引起，是包括Charcot-Marie-Tooth 4J型（CMT4J）和肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）在内的一系列致命性神经系统疾病的基础。为了绘制大脑中PI(3,5)P2不足的分子后果，我们对携带Fig4或Vac14不同功能缺失突变的三株小鼠系进行了定量蛋白质组学和转录组学分析，检查了症状前和终末期的大脑。引人注目的是，在出生后第5天（在显著的神经退行性变之前）已经存在深刻的神经炎症，其特征是补体激活、干扰素信号传导以及外周髓系细胞和T细胞的实质浸润。分离的突变小胶质细胞表现出显著促氧化的转录状态，伴有升高的活性氧，这是一种部分非细胞自主的表型，存在于仅神经元和星形胶质细胞中条件性失活Fig4的小鼠的小胶质细胞中。早期（P5）和晚期（P25）蛋白质组学数据的比较显示，PI(3,5)P2不足损害了大脑蛋白质组的发育重塑：通常在出生后成熟过程中上调的蛋白质未能积累，暗示溶酶体功能在神经发育中的作用。我们确定了p53、Fas受体、炎症性半胱天冬酶、Gasdermin D、RIPK1和ZBP1的协同升高，与具有凋亡、焦亡和坏死性凋亡特征的多因素炎症性细胞死亡一致。许多失调的蛋白质由在溶酶体贮积症、ALS、CMT、阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病中突变的基因编码，扩展了PI(3,5)P2不足的致病相关性。总之，这些发现确立了早期神经炎症是由溶酶体PI(3,5)P2破坏引起的神经退行性变的一个决定性——并且可能是起始性——特征。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，通过多组学分析在ALS相关基因突变模型中首次明确早期神经炎症是溶酶体功能障碍导致神经退行性变的起始事件，具有高度的ALS相关性。

items.title: Drivers of Rising Prevalence in Major Motor Neurodegenerative Diseases: Temporal Trends in Sweden and France (2003-2022).
items.summary: The prevalence of Parkinson disease (PD), multiple sclerosis (MS), and motor neuron diseases (MNDs) is rising globally. However, it is unclear to what degree this is related to an increase in incidence or to improved survival after diagnosis. We performed 2 nationwide, population-based, retrospective cohort studies, including all individuals living in Sweden between 2001 and 2016 and living in France between 2009 and 2022, respectively. Pooled mixed-effects regression models, with country as a random effect, were used to determine temporal trends in prevalence, crude and age-standardized and sex-standardized incidence, and age and life expectancy at diagnosis. Annualized prevalence of PD, MS, and MNDs increased significantly between 2003 and 2022 in the pooled model (PD: prevalence ratio [PR] per year = 1.014, p < 0.001; MS: PR = 1.029, p < 0.001; MND: PR = 1.028, p < 0.001). While the crude incidence of both PD and MS remained nearly stable over time (PD: incidence rate ratio [IRR] per year = 0.998, p < 0.001; MS: IRR = 0.992, p < 0.001), the standardized incidence showed a more marked decrease for PD (IRR = 0.986, p < 0.001) while remaining almost unchanged for MS (IRR = 0.995, p < 0.001). For MNDs, both the crude and standardized incidence increased over time (crude IRR = 1.018, p < 0.001; standardized IRR = 1.008, p < 0.001). Life expectancy at diagnosis of PD increased between 2003 and 2013 (+0.95 months per calendar year, p < 0.001) and then decreased between 2013 and 2022 (-1.20 months, p = 0.002), while it increased significantly over the entire study period for MS (+2.35 months, p < 0.001) and MNDs (+0.34 months, p = 0.01). These findings indicate that the rising MS prevalence is largely survival-driven and the rising MND prevalence reflects a true increase in incidence, whereas PD prevalence grows modestly, largely independent of incidence. Depending on the mechanism that drives prevalence, whether increased incidence reflecting changing risk factor exposures, improved survival due to therapeutic advances, or demographic aging of the population, inferences about underlying causes differ substantially between PD, MS, and MNDs, with direct implications for health care planning and etiologic research.
items.titleZh: 主要运动神经退行性疾病患病率上升的驱动因素：瑞典和法国的时间趋势（2003-2022年）
items.summaryZh: 基于瑞典和法国的大规模人群数据，发现运动神经元病（包括ALS）的患病率上升主要源于发病率的真实增加，而非生存改善；多发性硬化的患病率上升则主要由生存改善驱动；帕金森病的患病率增长温和，与发病率变化无关。
items.insight: 该研究为ALS研究者提供了关键流行病学证据：ALS患病率上升并非仅因诊断后生存延长，而是反映了发病率的真实增加，提示环境或遗传风险因素可能正在发生变化，值得进一步探索病因。

aiRead.studyType: 基于人群的回顾性队列研究
aiRead.keyFinding: 运动神经元病（MND）的患病率上升主要由发病率真实增加驱动，而非生存改善。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于瑞典和法国数据，可能不直接推广至其他地区；未区分MND亚型（如ALS与脊髓性肌萎缩症）。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否进一步分析MND发病率增加的具体风险因素（如环境暴露、遗传背景），以及不同亚型间的差异。

items.abstractZh: 帕金森病（PD）、多发性硬化（MS）和运动神经元病（MND）的患病率在全球范围内上升。然而，这在多大程度上与发病率增加或诊断后生存改善相关尚不清楚。我们进行了两项全国性、基于人群的回顾性队列研究，分别纳入2001年至2016年间生活在瑞典的所有个体和2009年至2022年间生活在法国的所有个体。采用以国家为随机效应的混合效应回归模型，确定患病率、粗发病率和年龄性别标准化发病率、诊断时年龄和预期寿命的时间趋势。在混合模型中，2003年至2022年间PD、MS和MND的年化患病率显著增加（PD：患病率比[PR]每年=1.014，p<0.001；MS：PR=1.029，p<0.001；MND：PR=1.028，p<0.001）。虽然PD和MS的粗发病率随时间保持基本稳定（PD：发病率比[IRR]每年=0.998，p<0.001；MS：IRR=0.992，p<0.001），但标准化发病率显示PD下降更明显（IRR=0.986，p<0.001），而MS几乎不变（IRR=0.995，p<0.001）。对于MND，粗发病率和标准化发病率均随时间增加（粗IRR=1.018，p<0.001；标准化IRR=1.008，p<0.001）。PD诊断时预期寿命在2003年至2013年间增加（每年+0.95个月，p<0.001），然后在2013年至2022年间下降（-1.20个月，p=0.002），而MS（+2.35个月，p<0.001）和MND（+0.34个月，p=0.01）在整个研究期间显著增加。这些发现表明，MS患病率上升主要由生存驱动，MND患病率上升反映了发病率的真实增加，而PD患病率增长温和，基本与发病率无关。根据驱动患病率的机制——是反映风险因素暴露变化的发病率增加、治疗进步带来的生存改善，还是人口老龄化——PD、MS和MND的潜在原因推断存在显著差异，这对医疗保健规划和病因学研究具有直接影响。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2022年最新数据，直接区分了ALS患病率上升的驱动因素（发病率增加 vs 生存改善），对ALS病因研究和医疗资源规划具有重要转化价值。

items.source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.title: IRE1 regulates the proteostasis of TDP-43/TARDBP in ALS/FTD through ribosome-associated quality control.
items.summary: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) are progressive neurodegenerative disorders characterized by motor neuron degeneration, leading to muscle weakness, atrophy, and cognitive impairments. A defining pathological hallmark of ALS/FTD is the cytosolic mislocalization and accumulation of TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43), highlighting its critical role in ALS pathogenesis. However, the molecular mechanisms underlying TDP-43 proteostasis remain poorly understood. Through a genetic screening approach, we identify inositol-requiring enzyme 1 (IRE1), an endoplasmic reticulum-resident transmembrane protein, as a potent suppressor of TDP-43 protein levels. Furthermore, we show that ribosome-associated quality control (RQC) factors play a crucial role in regulating TDP-43 proteostasis and cellular toxicity. Activation of the RQC pathway prevents excessive accumulation of TDP-43 and associated toxicity. Mechanistically, our findings suggest that IRE1 regulates TDP-43 protein level by promoting the degradation of aberrant TDP-43 translation product through the RQC pathway. IRE1 acts canonically to enhance the transcription of the RQC core component Clbn/NEMF and noncanonically to physically interact with Clbn/NEMF, thereby ameliorating TDP-43-induced proteotoxicity. Moreover, ectopic expression or pharmacological activation of IRE1 alleviates TDP-43 pathology and restores cognitive function in the TDP-43 A315T ALS mouse models. Collectively, our study identifies a role for IRE1 in the translational quality control of TDP-43 and establishes its potential as a therapeutic target for ALS/FTD.
items.titleZh: IRE1通过核糖体相关质量控制调控ALS/FTD中TDP-43/TARDBP的蛋白稳态
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过遗传筛选发现IRE1是TDP-43蛋白水平的抑制因子，并揭示IRE1通过核糖体相关质量控制（RQC）通路促进异常TDP-43翻译产物的降解，从而调控TDP-43蛋白稳态。在ALS小鼠模型中，激活IRE1可减轻TDP-43病理并改善认知功能。
items.insight: 该研究首次将IRE1与TDP-43的翻译质量控制联系起来，为理解ALS/FTD中TDP-43蛋白稳态失调的机制提供了新视角，并提出了IRE1作为潜在治疗靶点，值得ALS研究者关注其在蛋白稳态调控中的转化价值。

aiRead.studyType: 机制研究（动物/细胞实验）
aiRead.keyFinding: IRE1通过经典和非经典途径激活RQC通路，促进异常TDP-43翻译产物的降解，从而减轻TDP-43病理并改善ALS小鼠模型的认知功能。
aiRead.limitation: 研究主要基于小鼠模型和细胞实验，IRE1在人类ALS/FTD患者中的具体作用及长期治疗效果尚需进一步验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注IRE1激动剂在ALS/FTD患者中的临床试验进展，以及RQC通路其他组分在TDP-43蛋白病中的功能研究。

items.abstractZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）和额颞叶痴呆（FTD）是进行性神经退行性疾病，以运动神经元变性为特征，导致肌肉无力、萎缩和认知障碍。ALS/FTD的一个决定性病理标志是TAR DNA结合蛋白43（TDP-43）在胞质中的错误定位和积累，突显了其在ALS发病机制中的关键作用。然而，TDP-43蛋白稳态的分子机制仍知之甚少。通过遗传筛选方法，我们鉴定了内质网驻留跨膜蛋白——肌醇需求酶1（IRE1）作为TDP-43蛋白水平的有效抑制因子。此外，我们发现核糖体相关质量控制（RQC）因子在调控TDP-43蛋白稳态和细胞毒性中发挥关键作用。RQC通路的激活可防止TDP-43的过度积累及其相关毒性。机制上，我们的发现表明IRE1通过RQC通路促进异常TDP-43翻译产物的降解来调控TDP-43蛋白水平。IRE1通过经典途径增强RQC核心组分Clbn/NEMF的转录，并通过非经典途径与Clbn/NEMF发生物理相互作用，从而改善TDP-43诱导的蛋白毒性。此外，在TDP-43 A315T ALS小鼠模型中，IRE1的异位表达或药理学激活可减轻TDP-43病理并恢复认知功能。总之，我们的研究确定了IRE1在TDP-43翻译质量控制中的作用，并确立了其作为ALS/FTD治疗靶点的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，揭示了IRE1通过RQC通路调控TDP-43蛋白稳态的新机制，具有高度的ALS相关性，并提供了动物模型中的治疗验证，具备转化潜力。

items.title: Persistent deficits in the motor unit following mono and dual administration of SMN up-regulators in the SmnΔ7 mouse model of spinal muscular atrophy.
items.summary: Spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) is characterized by motor neuron loss and neuromuscular junction (NMJ) pathology. Although SMN-upregulating therapies such as Nusinersen markedly improve survival and motor function for many patients, impactful deficits often remain. In order to generate the next generation of therapy for SMA, it is critical that we understand the cellular basis for persistent deficits and find strategies to support and promote motor unit repair. Here we performed a detailed temporal analysis of the distal motor unit following administration of the Smn up-regulator Nusinersen in a range of differentially vulnerable cranial muscles in the SmnΔ7 mouse model. We show that early administration of Nusinersen facilitates progressive recovery of motor endplate innervation, even in the most vulnerable muscles. However, there is a persistent decrease in intramuscular motor axon number and increase in motor unit size, which is most severe in the most vulnerable muscles. We further show that combining Nusinersen with the Risdiplam tool compound SMN-C8 leads to a synergistic increase in Smn levels but does not produce broad improvements in motor unit recovery beyond those achieved with Nusinersen alone. Nevertheless, dual therapy resulted in significant improvement in hindlimb splay score from post-natal day 10 onwards. These effects suggest that enhanced SMN restoration may confer selective functional and structural benefits, although these were insufficient to fully rescue persistent motor unit pathology. Collectively, our findings demonstrate that early Smn restoration enables robust NMJ reinnervation but fails to prevent axon loss and motor unit remodelling. The limited additional benefit observed with dual SMN up-regulation, despite synergistic increases in Smn levels, suggests a potential ceiling effect for SMN-dependent rescue and highlights the need for adjunctive SMN-independent strategies aimed at preserving axons, stabilizing motor units, and promoting neuromuscular regeneration in SMA.
items.titleZh: 脊髓性肌萎缩症SmnΔ7小鼠模型中单次和联合使用SMN上调剂后运动单位的持续性缺陷
items.summaryZh: 在SMA小鼠模型中，早期使用Nusinersen可促进神经肌肉接头恢复，但无法阻止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑；联合使用Risdiplam工具化合物虽能协同提高SMN蛋白水平，但并未显著改善运动单位病理，提示SMN依赖性治疗存在天花板效应。
items.insight: 该研究揭示了SMN上调疗法在SMA中的局限性，即早期干预虽能部分恢复神经支配，但无法完全逆转运动单位病理，这为ALS等神经退行性疾病中运动单位修复策略的探索提供了重要参考，尤其是SMN非依赖性辅助治疗的必要性。

aiRead.keyFinding: 早期Nusinersen治疗促进NMJ再神经支配，但无法防止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑；联合SMN上调存在天花板效应。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于SMA小鼠模型，结果向ALS等疾病的转化需进一步验证；未评估长期功能结局。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注SMN非依赖性策略（如轴突保护或再生促进）在SMA和ALS模型中的后续研究。

items.abstractZh: 脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）的特征是运动神经元丢失和神经肌肉接头（NMJ）病理。尽管Nusinersen等SMN上调疗法显著改善了许多患者的生存和运动功能，但仍有显著的缺陷持续存在。为了开发下一代SMA疗法，理解持续性缺陷的细胞基础并寻找支持和促进运动单位修复的策略至关重要。本研究在SmnΔ7小鼠模型中，对一系列不同易损性的颅肌施用Smn上调剂Nusinersen后，对远端运动单位进行了详细的时间分析。结果显示，早期施用Nusinersen促进了运动终板神经支配的逐步恢复，即使在最易损的肌肉中也是如此。然而，肌内运动轴突数量持续减少，运动单位大小增加，这在最易损的肌肉中最为严重。进一步发现，将Nusinersen与Risdiplam工具化合物SMN-C8联合使用可协同增加Smn水平，但并未在运动单位恢复方面产生比单独使用Nusinersen更广泛的改善。尽管如此，联合治疗从出生后第10天起显著改善了后肢张开评分。这些效应表明，增强的SMN恢复可能带来选择性的功能和结构益处，尽管这些不足以完全挽救持续的运动单位病理。总之，我们的发现表明，早期Smn恢复能够实现强大的NMJ再神经支配，但未能防止轴突丢失和运动单位重塑。尽管Smn水平协同增加，但联合SMN上调观察到的额外益处有限，提示SMN依赖性挽救可能存在天花板效应，并强调了在SMA中需要辅助性的SMN非依赖性策略，以保护轴突、稳定运动单位并促进神经肌肉再生。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究发表于2026年，聚焦SMA模型中对当前临床SMN上调疗法（Nusinersen和Risdiplam）的长期运动单位缺陷进行机制性分析，具有直接的ALS相关性，因为运动单位病理是ALS的核心特征。

items.source: Neurological sciences : official journal of the Italian Neurological Society and of the Italian Society of Clinical Neurophysiology
items.title: Characterization of sensory nerve conduction abnormalities at the time of ALS diagnosis.
items.summary: Although sensory nerve abnormalities have been reported in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), their distribution at diagnosis, relative to motor involvement and clinical onset phenotype remains incompletely characterized. We aimed to systematically compare sensory and motor nerve conduction abnormalities at ALS diagnosis and determine whether sensory involvement follows an onset-dependent pattern similar to motor dysfunction. In this prospective cross-sectional study, 40 newly diagnosed ALS patients enrolled in the Iran University ALS Registry (March 2022-March 2023) underwent standardized motor and sensory nerve conduction studies (NCS). For between-group comparisons, a matched ALS subgroup was compared with matched healthy controls, while the expanded ALS cohort was used for subgroup and correlation analyses. SNAP amplitudes of the median, ulnar, and sural nerves were reduced by 45%, 34%, and 43%, respectively, compared with healthy controls, with similar reductions observed across upper- and lower-limb onset phenotypes and no significant onset-dependent differences. In contrast CMAP amplitudes were markedly reduced in ALS patients, most prominently in the peroneal (79%), median (47%), tibial (42%), and ulnar (37%) nerves. Motor abnormalities were most severe in the clinically affected limb but were also detectable in asymptomatic extremities, consistent with early subclinical spread. At ALS diagnosis, sensory and motor nerve conduction abnormalities exhibited divergent spatial patterns, with asymmetric, onset-related motor involvement and relatively uniform sensory axonal dysfunction. These findings support the presence of measurable sensory nerve conduction abnormalities in a subset of ALS patients, while highlighting the need for cautious interpretation of sensory NCS changes in ALS.
items.titleZh: ALS诊断时感觉神经传导异常的特征分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究对40名新诊断ALS患者进行神经传导检查，发现感觉神经（正中、尺、腓肠神经）波幅普遍下降约34-45%，且与起病部位无关；而运动神经波幅下降更严重且呈不对称、起病依赖性模式。提示ALS诊断时已存在可测量的感觉神经受累，但模式与运动受累不同。
items.insight: 该研究系统量化了ALS诊断时感觉神经传导异常的分布和程度，挑战了ALS纯运动神经元的传统观念，为早期诊断和鉴别诊断（如与感觉运动神经病区分）提供了新依据，值得ALS研究者关注。

aiRead.studyType: 前瞻性横断面观察性研究
aiRead.keyFinding: ALS诊断时感觉神经（正中、尺、腓肠神经）SNAP波幅普遍降低约34-45%，呈相对均匀分布，与起病表型无关；而运动神经CMAP波幅降低更严重且呈不对称、起病依赖性模式。
aiRead.limitation: 样本量较小（40例），单中心设计，未进行纵向随访以评估感觉异常的进展性。
aiRead.watchNext: 后续应关注感觉神经异常在ALS病程中的演变规律及其与预后、认知功能的关系，以及能否作为早期诊断或疾病进展的生物标志物。

items.abstractZh: 尽管肌萎缩侧索硬化（ALS）中已有感觉神经异常的报道，但诊断时其分布、与运动受累的关系以及临床起病表型的相关性尚未完全阐明。本研究旨在系统比较ALS诊断时的感觉与运动神经传导异常，并确定感觉受累是否遵循与运动功能障碍类似的起病依赖性模式。在这项前瞻性横断面研究中，40名新诊断的ALS患者（2022年3月至2023年3月纳入伊朗大学ALS登记处）接受了标准化的运动和感觉神经传导研究（NCS）。在组间比较中，匹配的ALS亚组与匹配的健康对照组进行比较，而扩大的ALS队列用于亚组和相关性分析。与健康对照组相比，正中神经、尺神经和腓肠神经的SNAP波幅分别降低了45%、34%和43%，在上肢和下肢起病表型中观察到类似的降低，且无显著的起病依赖性差异。相比之下，ALS患者的CMAP波幅显著降低，最显著的是腓总神经（79%）、正中神经（47%）、胫神经（42%）和尺神经（37%）。运动异常在临床受累肢体中最严重，但在无症状肢体中也可检测到，符合早期亚临床扩散。在ALS诊断时，感觉和运动神经传导异常表现出不同的空间模式：不对称的、与起病相关的运动受累和相对均匀的感觉轴突功能障碍。这些发现支持在部分ALS患者中存在可测量的感觉神经传导异常，同时强调了对ALS中感觉NCS变化进行谨慎解读的必要性。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究基于2022-2023年新诊断ALS患者的前瞻性数据，揭示了ALS诊断时感觉神经受累的普遍性和模式，具有ALS诊断相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Targeting mtDNA to Modulate Mitochondrial Dysfunction in Neurodegenerative Diseases.
items.summary: Mitochondrial dysfunction is a common pathological feature of neurodegenerative diseases namely Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, and Huntington's disease. Although these disorders are primarily driven by disease-specific genetic and proteopathic mechanisms, increasing evidence suggests that secondary mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) damage and heteroplasmy shifts may exacerbate bioenergetic failure and neuronal vulnerability. Distinguishing primary disease mechanisms from downstream mtDNA alterations is critical to accurately evaluate emerging therapeutic strategies. Recent advances in mtDNA-targeted genome editing have enabled the direct manipulation of mitochondrial genomes. Mitochondrially targeted zinc finger nucleases and TALENs can selectively alter mutant mtDNA to induce heteroplasmy shifts, whereas DddA-derived cytosine base editors allow precise base editing without double-strand breaks. However, each platform has distinct limitations related to the target scope, off-target risk, design complexity, and delivery efficiency. The application of CRISPR/Cas-based systems to mammalian mtDNA remains constrained by the unresolved challenges in guiding RNA import. This review critically examines mitochondrial dysfunction and mutant mtDNA accumulation in neurodegenerative diseases. It also evaluates current and emerging mtDNA-editing techniques, and highlights key translational barriers. We highlighted that mtDNA-targeted interventions can be a promising approach for disease-modifying or adjunctive strategies, rather than curative approaches.
items.titleZh: 靶向线粒体DNA调控神经退行性疾病中的线粒体功能障碍
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了线粒体DNA损伤在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的作用，并评估了多种mtDNA编辑技术（如锌指核酸酶、TALENs、碱基编辑器）的进展与局限，指出这些技术有望作为疾病修饰策略，但尚不能治愈。
items.insight: 该综述系统梳理了mtDNA编辑技术在ALS等疾病中的最新进展，特别是区分了原发机制与继发性mtDNA改变的重要性，为研究者设计靶向线粒体的治疗策略提供了关键参考。

aiRead.keyFinding: mtDNA损伤和异质性偏移是神经退行性疾病的共同特征，新兴mtDNA编辑技术（如TALENs和碱基编辑器）可选择性改变突变mtDNA，但存在递送和脱靶等障碍。
aiRead.limitation: 综述基于现有文献，未提供原始实验数据；CRISPR/Cas系统在mtDNA中的应用仍受限于RNA导入问题。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注mtDNA碱基编辑器在ALS动物模型中的体内递送效率及安全性验证。

items.abstractZh: 线粒体功能障碍是神经退行性疾病（包括阿尔茨海默病、帕金森病、肌萎缩侧索硬化症和亨廷顿病）的共同病理特征。尽管这些疾病主要由疾病特异性的遗传和蛋白质病变机制驱动，但越来越多的证据表明，继发性线粒体DNA损伤和异质性偏移可能加剧生物能量衰竭和神经元脆弱性。区分主要疾病机制与下游mtDNA改变对于准确评估新兴治疗策略至关重要。近期mtDNA靶向基因组编辑的进展使得直接操纵线粒体基因组成为可能。线粒体靶向锌指核酸酶和TALENs可选择性地改变突变mtDNA以诱导异质性偏移，而DddA衍生的胞嘧啶碱基编辑器则可在不产生双链断裂的情况下进行精确碱基编辑。然而，每种平台在靶标范围、脱靶风险、设计复杂性和递送效率方面都有不同的局限性。基于CRISPR/Cas的系统在哺乳动物mtDNA中的应用仍受限于引导RNA导入的未解决挑战。本综述批判性地审视了神经退行性疾病中的线粒体功能障碍和突变mtDNA积累，评估了当前和新兴的mtDNA编辑技术，并强调了关键的转化障碍。我们指出，mtDNA靶向干预可作为一种有前景的疾病修饰或辅助策略，而非治愈性方法。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦于新兴mtDNA编辑技术（如DddA碱基编辑器）在ALS等神经退行性疾病中的转化潜力，具有高度前沿性和ALS相关性。

items.title: Noninvasive assessment of cardiovascular autonomic reflexes in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: a systematic review.
items.summary: Dysautonomia is gradually recognized in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), raising concerns of secondary complications from heightened autonomic burden. Autonomic disturbances, particularly cardiac dysautonomia, significantly impact patient outcomes, contributing to increased cardiovascular risks and mortality rate. While the ALS Functional Rating Score-Revised (ALSFRS-R) measures functional decline as disease progress, it overlooks autonomic criteria - a critical factor in ALS progression. This review aims to analyze noninvasive applications of cardiovascular signal variability for continuous real-time monitoring of autonomic dysfunction in ALS, while addressing gaps in current clinical assessments. A total of 584 literatures were gathered from four databases (WoS, PubMed, Science Direct and MEDLINE EBSCOhost) - published from inception till December 2023. 21 peer-reviewed studies were included in this review after screening and meeting the inclusion criteria. Various cardiovascular signal variability metrics and autonomic protocols were discussed. Key findings highlight cardiac autonomic dysfunction in ALS is marked by reduced heart rate variability, absent blood pressure regulation upon orthostatic stress and circadian changes, prolonged QTc interval and low baroreflex sensitivity. Moreover, increased autonomic burden is associated with a shift from sympathetic to parasympathetic dysregulation as the disease progresses. Evidence highlights the need to integrate noninvasive autonomic biomarkers into digital ALS monitoring frameworks, enabling earlier detection of autonomic involvement and more precise longitudinal monitoring beyond motor decline.
items.titleZh: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症中心血管自主神经反射的无创评估：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇系统综述分析了21项研究，发现ALS患者存在显著的心脏自主神经功能障碍，包括心率变异性降低、血压调节异常和QTc间期延长。研究强调，现有ALSFRS-R量表未涵盖自主神经功能，建议将无创心血管信号变异性指标纳入ALS数字监测体系，以实现更全面的疾病追踪。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了ALS心脏自主神经功能障碍的无创评估证据，指出心率变异性等指标可作为疾病进展的潜在生物标志物，弥补ALSFRS-R的不足，为ALS临床监测和临床试验终点设计提供了新方向。

aiRead.keyFinding: ALS患者存在心脏自主神经功能障碍，表现为心率变异性降低、血压调节缺失和QTc间期延长，且随疾病进展从交感神经失调转向副交感神经失调。
aiRead.limitation: 纳入研究数量有限（21篇），且各研究在方法学和指标上存在异质性，可能影响结论的普适性。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否开发出标准化的无创自主神经评估方案，并验证其在ALS临床试验中的预测价值。

items.abstractZh: 自主神经功能障碍在肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）中逐渐被认识，引发了对自主神经负荷增加所致继发性并发症的担忧。自主神经紊乱，特别是心脏自主神经功能障碍，显著影响患者预后，导致心血管风险增加和死亡率上升。虽然ALS功能评定量表修订版（ALSFRS-R）可测量疾病进展过程中的功能衰退，但它忽略了自主神经标准——这是ALS进展中的一个关键因素。本综述旨在分析心血管信号变异性的无创应用，用于ALS自主神经功能障碍的连续实时监测，同时指出现有临床评估中的空白。从四个数据库（WoS、PubMed、Science Direct和MEDLINE EBSCOhost）中收集了584篇文献，发表时间从建库至2023年12月。经过筛选并符合纳入标准后，本综述纳入了21篇同行评审研究。讨论了各种心血管信号变异性指标和自主神经方案。主要发现表明，ALS中的心脏自主神经功能障碍表现为心率变异性降低、直立应激和昼夜节律变化时血压调节缺失、QTc间期延长以及压力反射敏感性降低。此外，随着疾病进展，自主神经负荷增加与从交感神经失调向副交感神经失调的转变相关。证据强调了将无创自主神经生物标志物整合到数字ALS监测框架中的必要性，从而能够更早地检测自主神经受累，并在运动功能衰退之外进行更精确的纵向监测。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，系统总结了ALS心脏自主神经功能障碍的无创评估方法，具有新近性和ALS相关性，为将自主神经生物标志物纳入数字监测框架提供了转化价值。

items.title: Dynamic integration of skeletal muscle signals via extracellular vesicles in motor neuron diseases.
items.summary: Extracellular vesicles (EVs) are heterogenous lipid bilayer-enclosed particles secreted by virtually all cell types. They encapsulate a diverse array of bioactive molecules, including proteins, lipids, nucleic acids, and metabolites, which can be transferred to recipient cells, thereby modulating their function and phenotype. In recent years, skeletal muscle-derived EVs (SkM-EVs) have emerged as key players in the bidirectional communication between skeletal muscle and motor neurons, contributing to the establishment and maintenance of neuromuscular homeostasis. Disruptions in this intercellular signalling have been implicated in the pathophysiology of motor neuron diseases (MNDs) such as spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). In these contexts, SkM-EVs may contribute to disease progression by delivering pathogenic cargo, including misfolded proteins and aberrant RNAs, to motor neurons. A comprehensive understanding of SkM-EV biology, particularly their roles in neuromuscular communication, could offer critical insights into disease mechanisms and identify novel opportunities for biomarker discovery and therapeutic intervention. This review synthesizes current knowledge on the functional roles of SkM-EVs in motor neuron health and disease and evaluates their potential as diagnostic tools and therapeutic vectors in the context of MNDs.
items.titleZh: 运动神经元疾病中通过细胞外囊泡实现的骨骼肌信号动态整合
items.summaryZh: 骨骼肌释放的细胞外囊泡（SkM-EVs）在运动神经元与肌肉之间的双向通讯中起关键作用。在ALS和SMA等疾病中，SkM-EVs可能携带错误折叠蛋白和异常RNA，加速运动神经元损伤。该综述总结了SkM-EVs作为疾病机制研究、生物标志物发现及治疗载体的潜力。
items.insight: 该综述系统整合了SkM-EVs在神经肌肉通讯中的最新证据，为ALS研究者提供了从肌肉信号角度理解疾病传播机制的新框架，并指出了利用SkM-EVs进行早期诊断和靶向治疗的转化路径。

aiRead.keyFinding: 骨骼肌来源的细胞外囊泡（SkM-EVs）通过递送致病性蛋白质和RNA参与运动神经元疾病的进展，并可作为生物标志物和治疗载体。
aiRead.limitation: 综述基于现有文献，缺乏原始实验数据；SkM-EVs在体内的具体作用机制和临床验证仍需进一步研究。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注SkM-EVs作为ALS早期诊断生物标志物的临床验证研究，以及基于SkM-EVs的靶向治疗策略在动物模型中的测试结果。

items.abstractZh: 细胞外囊泡（EVs）是由几乎所有细胞类型分泌的异质性脂双层包裹的颗粒。它们封装了多种生物活性分子，包括蛋白质、脂质、核酸和代谢物，这些分子可以转移至受体细胞，从而调节其功能和表型。近年来，骨骼肌来源的细胞外囊泡（SkM-EVs）已成为骨骼肌与运动神经元之间双向通讯的关键参与者，有助于神经肌肉稳态的建立和维持。这种细胞间信号的中断被认为与运动神经元疾病（MNDs）如脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）和肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）的病理生理学有关。在这些情况下，SkM-EVs可能通过向运动神经元递送致病性货物（包括错误折叠的蛋白质和异常RNA）来促进疾病进展。全面理解SkM-EV生物学，特别是它们在神经肌肉通讯中的作用，可为疾病机制提供关键见解，并识别生物标志物发现和治疗干预的新机会。本综述综合了当前关于SkM-EVs在运动神经元健康和疾病中功能作用的知识，并评估了它们在MNDs背景下作为诊断工具和治疗载体的潜力。
items.frontierRationale: 该综述发表于2026年，聚焦于骨骼肌来源细胞外囊泡在ALS等运动神经元疾病中的动态信号整合，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Isoform-specific steric zippers drive aberrant assembly and mislocalization of shortened TDP-43.
items.summary: Prion-like domain (PrLD)-mediated aggregation and concomitant dysfunction of the essential RNA-binding protein transactive response (TAR) DNA-binding protein of 43 kilodaltons (TDP-43) is a common feature of multiple debilitating neurodegenerative disorders, including amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). However, shortened TDP-43 (sTDP-43) splice isoforms where the PrLD is largely replaced by an 18-residue carboxyl-terminal tail also contribute to ALS pathophysiology and are enriched in motor neurons. Curiously, despite lacking most of the PrLD, sTDP-43 exhibits pronounced insolubility in cells and tissue of patients with ALS. Here, we establish that the short, isoform-specific carboxyl-terminal tail of sTDP-43 confers high aggregation propensity, which is encoded by two clusters of steric zippers, and can be mitigated by short RNA chaperones. Disrupting these zippers enhances sTDP-43 solubility at the pure protein level and in neurons. Notably, these steric zippers, rather than a predicted nuclear export signal in the carboxyl-terminal tail, drive cytoplasmic mislocalization and aggregation of sTDP-43 in neurons. Thus, we define the sequence-encoded determinants of aberrant sTDP-43 assembly and provide mechanistic insights into sTDP-43 disease pathology.
items.titleZh: 异构体特异性立体拉链驱动缩短型TDP-43的异常组装和错误定位
items.summaryZh: 该研究发现，缩短型TDP-43（sTDP-43）的短羧基末端尾巴通过两个立体拉链簇驱动其异常聚集和错误定位，而短RNA伴侣可减轻这一过程。破坏这些拉链可提高sTDP-43的可溶性。
items.insight: 该研究揭示了sTDP-43在ALS中聚集的分子机制，特别是异构体特异性立体拉链的作用，为开发针对sTDP-43聚集的治疗策略提供了新靶点。

aiRead.keyFinding: sTDP-43的羧基末端尾巴中的立体拉链簇驱动其聚集和错误定位，短RNA伴侣可减轻聚集。
aiRead.limitation: 研究主要在细胞和纯蛋白水平进行，需在动物模型中进一步验证。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注后续研究是否在ALS动物模型中验证立体拉链作为治疗靶点，以及短RNA伴侣的体内效果。

items.abstractZh: 朊病毒样结构域（PrLD）介导的聚集以及随之而来的必需RNA结合蛋白TDP-43的功能障碍，是包括肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）在内的多种神经退行性疾病的共同特征。然而，在ALS病理生理学中，缩短型TDP-43（sTDP-43）剪接异构体（其PrLD大部分被一个18个残基的羧基末端尾巴取代）也发挥作用，并在运动神经元中富集。奇怪的是，尽管缺乏大部分PrLD，sTDP-43在ALS患者的细胞和组织中表现出显著的不溶性。在此，我们确定sTDP-43的短异构体特异性羧基末端尾巴赋予高聚集倾向，这种倾向由两个立体拉链簇编码，并可通过短RNA伴侣减轻。破坏这些拉链可提高纯蛋白水平和神经元中sTDP-43的可溶性。值得注意的是，这些立体拉链（而非羧基末端尾巴中预测的核输出信号）驱动神经元中sTDP-43的胞质错误定位和聚集。因此，我们定义了异常sTDP-43组装的序列编码决定因素，并为sTDP-43疾病病理提供了机制见解。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究于2026年发表，直接针对ALS中sTDP-43的聚集机制，具有高度的ALS相关性和转化价值。

items.title: Lighting Up Mislocalized Proteins: Quantum Dot Probes for Multiplexed Cytoplasm-Selective Cell Profiling in Neurodegeneration.
items.summary: Semiconductor quantum dots (QDs) provide unique stability, brightness, and multiplexed capacity for biomarker detection in complex diseases; however, their distinctive intracellular distribution has rarely been leveraged for spatially resolved diagnostics. Here, we show how QD-based sensors enable selective detection of cytoplasmic proteins and can quantify nucleo-cytoplasm protein mislocalization in patient-derived samples. We validated this approach labeling TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43), a key mislocalized protein in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS). Spatial resolution is achieved in several patient-derived models and mouse brain tissue, underscoring the nanosensor's versatility across biological systems. Multiplexed QD-based immunolabeling, combined with confocal imaging and high-throughput flow cytometry, enables the detection of distinct cytoplasmic biomarker signatures that discriminate ALS patients from healthy controls. These signatures include variations in TDP-43 mislocalization and protein coexpression patterns, which were further modulated by pharmacological treatment. This work establishes QDs as spatially selective, multiplexable nanosensors capable of resolving subtle yet disease-relevant intracellular phenotypes in patient-derived samples. Compared to organic fluorophores, QDs enhance sensitivity, improve signal stability, and enable simultaneous spatially resolved biomarker quantification, broadening their potential for clinical diagnostics and personalized medicine. These findings establish QDs as powerful tools for neurodegeneration research, disease monitoring, and early biomarker discovery, with potential applications in translational neuroscience and precision medicine.
items.titleZh: 点亮错误定位的蛋白质：用于神经退行性疾病中多重细胞质选择性细胞分析的量子点探针
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发了基于量子点的纳米传感器，能够选择性检测细胞质蛋白，并量化ALS患者样本中TDP-43的核-细胞质错误定位。通过多重免疫标记和成像技术，可区分ALS患者与健康对照，并监测药物治疗效果。
items.insight: 该研究为ALS研究者提供了一种新的工具，能够以高灵敏度和空间分辨率直接检测患者样本中TDP-43的错误定位，这是ALS病理的核心事件。量子点的多重检测能力有望实现更精准的疾病分型和治疗监测。

aiRead.keyFinding: 量子点探针可选择性检测细胞质蛋白，并量化ALS患者样本中TDP-43的错误定位，通过多重分析区分患者与健康对照。
aiRead.limitation: 研究基于有限的患者样本和模型，量子点探针的临床转化仍需大规模验证和标准化。
aiRead.watchNext: 关注量子点探针在更大ALS队列中的验证，以及与其他神经退行性疾病（如FTD）的交叉应用。

items.abstractZh: 半导体量子点（QDs）在复杂疾病的生物标志物检测中具有独特的稳定性、亮度和多重检测能力；然而，其独特的细胞内分布很少被用于空间分辨诊断。本研究展示了基于量子点的传感器如何实现对细胞质蛋白的选择性检测，并能够在患者来源样本中量化核-细胞质蛋白的错误定位。我们通过标记TAR DNA结合蛋白43（TDP-43，肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）中一种关键的错误定位蛋白）验证了该方法。在多种患者来源模型和小鼠脑组织中实现了空间分辨率，突显了该纳米传感器在生物系统中的多功能性。基于量子点的多重免疫标记，结合共聚焦成像和高通量流式细胞术，能够检测区分ALS患者与健康对照的独特细胞质生物标志物特征。这些特征包括TDP-43错误定位和蛋白共表达模式的变化，并进一步受药物治疗调节。本研究确立了量子点作为空间选择性、可多重检测的纳米传感器，能够解析患者来源样本中细微但疾病相关的细胞内表型。与有机荧光团相比，量子点增强了灵敏度，提高了信号稳定性，并实现了同时的空间分辨生物标志物定量，拓宽了其在临床诊断和个性化医疗中的潜力。这些发现确立了量子点作为神经退行性疾病研究、疾病监测和早期生物标志物发现的强大工具，在转化神经科学和精准医学中具有潜在应用。
items.frontierRationale: 该研究利用量子点探针实现了对ALS患者样本中TDP-43错误定位的空间选择性多重检测，代表了纳米技术在神经退行性疾病诊断中的最新前沿应用。
